1.content: You decide! What point in time will Naruto’s story begin? At the beginning (Part 1) or during Shippuden (Part 2)?
1.title: Naruto’s Story Begins

12.content:
In Konoha, it was yet another normal morning for each and every citizen of said village. Even one Naruto Uzumaki, who slept peacefully in his bed. That was before the sun shined in through his windows and onto his face.

Naruto’s face scrunched up in little irritation before opening his eyes. Seeing that it was day, he reluctantly sat up with a groan and rubbed the sleep from his eyes.

“Morning already?” Naruto questioned tiredly before checking his clock and saw that it was 10:00 a.m.. “Guess I should get up then.”

Naruto got out of bed and quickly made it up before heading to the bathroom and make himself some breakfast. As he ate his bowl of cereal, Naruto wondered what he was gonna do for the day.

“Hmm. What am I gonna do on my day off? I don’t have any missions and I don’t feel like training today.” Naruto said before shrugging. “Eh. Maybe I’ll go out and see if I can find something to do.”

After putting away his bowl and getting dressed, Naruto headed out into the village. As he walked down the dirt road with his arms held behind his head, he looked out for something to do, but didn’t see anything fun. To Naruto, it was just a boring day in the village right now.

This in mind, Naruto though about some things he could do. He thought about meeting up with one of his friends to see if they wanted to hang out.

He also remembered a flyer Pervy Sage had given him for a sex club in a nearby village, called Reflections. Just case Naruto ever wanted to get some “experience” in the art of sex. Not that he would would go on normal circumstances, but now might be an exception. That aside, he wondered if there was any other option?

What does Naruto do to deal with his boredom? Does he run into one of his kunoichi friends, his age or older? Does he decide to try the ses club after all? Or does Naruto find something else to try?
12.title: Naruto Part 2: Shippuden

123.content:
Weighing his options, Naruto’s mind couldn’t stop wandering back to the idea of going to Reflections. He normally wouldn’t think twice about refusing to go to a sex club, but the more he thought about it, the more the idea appealed to him. He planned on having a girlfriend, so maybe it wouldn’t be such a bad thing to get some experience in sex.

After thinking long and hard about it, Naruto finally came to a decision. He dropped his fist into his open hand with a determined expression on his face.

“Alright, Reflections it is!” Naruto said excitedly, before heading out to accomplish his goal.

After leaving the Konoha and traveling for a few hours, Naruto had finally arrived at Shukuba Town. Upon arrival, Naruto had taken out the flyer for Reflections to find where the club was located.

“Hmm. Okay. It looks like it’s on Fun Fun Avenue.” Naruto said to himself as he read the flyer before something on it caught his eye. “What’s this? They offer a special for a discount? Huh. I wonder what that is. Maybe I’ll ask for it.”

Naruto searched through Fun Fun Avenue for a couple hours before finally finding Reflections. It definitely stood out with hot women standing outside, trying to bring in guests. With a little hesitation, Naruto entered the club, the ladies giving him flirty smiles as he walked by.

Upon entering the club, Naruto was greeted to the sight of many scantily clad beautiful women with a few flirting with what few men were around. This made Naruto’s mind wander to all of the hot things he’d get to experience. With that in mind, Naruto walked over to the receptionist’s desk, getting her attention.

“Hello, sir. What can I do for you today?” The receptionist asked politely.

“Hi. Uhh, I’m not exactly sure what to do here, but a friend of mine told me about this place. He said I could get some “experience” if come here.” Naruto explained, scratching his cheek awkwardly.

“Ah, yes. I see. You’re here to lose your virginity.” The woman said bluntly, making Naruto blush in embarrassment. “Heheh. It’s alright, sir. We get customers like you in here every now and then. Nothing to worry about.”

“O-Oh? Good. That’s a relief.” Naruto said, ignoring her bluntness before remembering the special. “Oh yeah. I was wondering about this special you guys offer. What’s that about?”

The receptionist’s eyes glinted without Naruto noticing before she spoke.

“Well, the special is a discount service we offer where one of our lovely ladies dresses up as a character of your choice for a fantasy experience. Are you interested, sir?” The receptionist asked, making Naruto scratch his chin in thought.

Should he buy the fantasy special or should he buy a night of regular sex? Or should he walk away now and forget he ever came here?
123.title: Go to Reflections.

info.brief_description: Naruto gets dominated by any and every kunoichi he knows.
info.description:
This is an interactive story for people who love Naruto Uzumaki, but want to him suffer some femdom, BDSM, Cuckolding, and everything that comes with them. I only have 2 rules for you all to follow.

Rules:
#1) Please focus on Naruto Uzumaki from Part 1 and Part 2 series. Nothing from the Boruto series. Everybody hates Boruto. Anything with Boruto will be deleted.

#2) This is NOT an all fetish story. That means NO VORE! NO FULL BODY SHRINKING!! NO CLOTHES TRANSFORMATION!!! NO PISS/SCAT!!!! Anything with this will be deleted.

That’s all that I ask of you is to follow these rules. I’m sorry, but when writers do add that stuff, you see a huge decline in other writers, because the people who’ve added this stuff have cut off all directions in an interactive story and ruined it.

I just got tired of seeing all of that, which is why this is a more specific story for people with specific fetishes.
